creator: koie@suri.co.jp
text:
net-mgmt/ipv6calc/files/patch-md5__Makefile.in
is a bad patch which breaks build.

Fix: 

remove patch-md5__Makefile.in
How-To-Repeat: guriandgura# pwd
/usr/ports/net-mgmt/ipv6calc
guriandgura# make
